# PERF-228 positive: errgroup fan-out over a 1-element composite workset
lang: go
file: PERF-228-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "golang.org/x/sync/errgroup"

type Page struct {
	Data []byte
}

func CompressPages(p Page) error {
	pages := []Page{p}
	var g errgroup.Group
	for _, page := range pages {
		page := page
		g.Go(func() error {
			_ = page.Data
			return nil
		})
	}
	return g.Wait()
}
